description: Flint, Mack, and Elena clear the Lighthouse floor of Vrellnexians, saving the remaining residents. Mack rallies the group, urging them to work together and resist Kasius’s machinations. Hope is rekindled with a sense of unity and small victory against overwhelming odds.

transcript.line: The Roaches are dead! You're safe now!
This fight's not over. If we want to survive, we can't let Kasius pit us against each other anymore.
